title: A text ads to get new owners operators to dispute for the truck

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: A text ads to get new owners operators to dispute for the truck

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: "Looking for your own business opportunity? Want to be your own boss? Become a truck owner-operator! We are looking for motivated individuals to join our team. Our company provides you with the tools and support you need to succeed. With a competitive lease program and top quality equipment, you have everything you need to start your new career. Don't miss out on this chance to own your own truck and control your own destiny. Apply now!"

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Cold calling script to dispute for new owner operators with new authority

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Hi, this is [Your Name] calling from [Company Name]. I hope you're having a great day.

I'm reaching out to you because we're currently looking for new owner-operators with new authority to join our team. We believe that you would be a great addition to our fleet.

As an owner-operator, you have the freedom to choose your own loads and schedules, and with new authority, you have the opportunity to build your business and grow your income.

Our company provides top-quality equipment, a competitive lease program, and a supportive team to help you succeed. We also offer training and resources to ensure you have the tools you need to be successful.

Would you be interested in learning more about this opportunity and how you can become a part of our team? Let me know, and we can set up a time for a more in-depth conversation.

Thank you for your time and consideration. Have a great day!

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Cold calling script to dispatching for new owner operators with new authority

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Hi, this is [Your Name] calling from [Company Name]. I hope I'm not catching you at a bad time.

The reason I'm calling you today is that our company is currently looking for new owner-operators with new authority to partner with and help grow our business. We are a rapidly growing company with multiple contracts, and we're looking to expand our fleet.

With our competitive rates, excellent customer service, and cutting-edge technology, we help our owner-operators build successful and profitable businesses.

We provide top-quality equipment, a supportive team of dispatchers, and the resources and training you need to succeed. We are committed to the success of our partner-operators, and strive to create long-term and mutually beneficial relationships.

Would you be interested in learning more about this opportunity and how we can help you grow your business? Let me know, and we can set up a time to discuss in more detail.

Thank you for your time and consideration. Have a great day!

evidence.snippet: Cold calling script to dispatching for new owner operators with new authority
evidence.speaker: user
